threads.label: Iran / Hormuz
threads.status_line: Trump shifted to '50/50' odds by afternoon; deal discourse ran ahead of reality all day — announcement was a pressure tactic, not confirmation of agreement
expand_if: Iranian uranium concession or refusal made public

threads.label: Israel / Lebanon
threads.status_line: 11 killed in Israeli strike on Sir al-Gharbieh; Nabatieh civil defence centre destroyed; Pentagon direct security track open; IDF soldier killed by drone
expand_if: Hezbollah rocket barrage on Israeli cities

threads.label: Ebola Bundibugyo — DRC / Uganda
threads.status_line: PHEIC declared 17 May; 746 suspected cases, 176 deaths in DRC; cases confirmed in Kampala Uganda — first cross-border spread
expand_if: WHO raises to highest alert level

threads.label: Turkey — CHP / Opposition
threads.status_line: Riot police entered CHP headquarters Istanbul; Imamoglu still detained; constitutional court challenge pending
expand_if: constitutional court ruling on Imamoglu detention

expand_if: new curator statement on current events
political intervention at a national pavilion

threads.label: UK Economic Stress
threads.status_line: 30Y gilt 5.53% (market closed, Bank Holiday); FTSE last 10,466; Brent above $105 adds fresh pressure — real test Tuesday open
expand_if: gilt yield spike above 5.5% with upward trajectory

threads.label: Olivia Dean / UK Chart

threads.label: Tucker Carlson

direct confrontation with White House escalates

threads.label: Mearsheimer
threads.status_line: Debated Nuland/Pompeo at Munk Debates May 20; 'Eating Humble Pie' post May 20 arguing Iran war is strategic loss for US; no new post since May 22
expand_if: shifts argument on a major topic

threads.label: Cannes 2026
threads.status_line: Festival closed May 23; Palme d'Or to Mungiu's Fjord (Neon); speech: 'pledge against any kind of fundamentalism'; no major follow-up today
expand_if: Mungiu makes direct political statement in press circuit
Fjord sparks specific controversy re: conflict framing
follow-up political statement from any winner

source_discoveries.name: Richard Haass — 'Home & Away' Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Former CFR president arguing Trump is recreating the JCPOA he destroyed, and that the regime change US hawks wanted produced a more hardline Iranian government — a structural counter-frame to the deal optimism

source_discoveries.name: L'Orient Today
source_discoveries.why_interesting: English-language edition of L'Orient Le Jour; takes a meaningfully different political line from Al-Nahar on Lebanese politics; useful for south Lebanon coverage that doesn't share Al-Nahar's political framing
